title: Clean Up Old Implementations
description: Remove deprecated boilerplate code after all tools are migrated to ToolSpec pattern
completion_notes: Cleanup was performed as part of T8 migration - old boilerplate replaced entirely with ToolSpec pattern
acceptance_criteria: Old ensure(), add_handler(), install() boilerplate removed
Only ToolSpec definitions remain in tool files
No dead code warnings from cargo clippy

subtasks.title: Audit remaining boilerplate
subtasks.description: Identify any remaining manual implementations that weren't migrated
acceptance_criteria: List of files with remaining boilerplate identified
Reason documented for any that can't be removed

subtasks.title: Remove old function implementations
subtasks.description: Delete deprecated ensure/install functions from each tool file
acceptance_criteria: All boilerplate functions removed from migrated tools

subtasks.title: Simplify tool file structure
subtasks.description: Reduce each tool file to minimal define_tool! invocation plus tests
acceptance_criteria: Each tool file follows consistent structure
No unnecessary imports or dead code
Average tool file size reduced to ~25-30 lines

subtasks.title: Clean up register_all() in mod.rs
subtasks.description: Remove manual registration lines if auto-registration is implemented

subtasks.title: Remove unused common.rs helpers
subtasks.description: Clean up helper functions that are no longer needed after abstraction
potential_removals: Functions only used by old boilerplate
subtasks.note: Be careful not to remove functions still used by custom_install hooks
acceptance_criteria: Custom install hooks still have access to needed utilities

subtasks.title: Run clippy and fix all warnings
subtasks.description: Ensure no dead code or unused import warnings remain

subtasks.title: Verify test coverage
subtasks.description: Ensure code coverage is maintained after cleanup

risks.description: Accidentally removing code still in use
risks.mitigation: Run full test suite after each removal batch
Carefully audit dependencies before removing common.rs functions
